stories.headline: Despite Some Losses for Trump, Supreme Court Delivers Enduring Conservative Wins
stories.summary: The justices pushed back on some of President Trump’s signature moves, but they also expanded presidential power and supplied victories on long-sought conservative goals.

stories.headline: Democratic socialist Kiros defeats longtime incumbent in Colorado primary
stories.summary: Former lawyer Melat Kiros, 29, has criticised Democrats for support of Israel during its genocidal war on Gaza.

stories.headline: Trump made over €1 billion from crypto in first year back in office, new filing shows
stories.summary: US President Donald Trump earned roughly $1.2 billion (€1.05bn) from his family's cryptocurrency ventures during his first year back in the White House, according to a federal financial disclosure released on Tuesday, even as ordinary investors in the same tokens nursed heavy losses.

stories.summary: Fireworks light up Mexico’s cities as fans toast historic knockout-round win and dream of a deeper run ahead.

stories.summary: Fans in San Diego erupt in celebration as Mexico beat Ecuador 2-0 in a World Cup knockout match, ending a 40-year drought in the competition.

stories.headline: Wayve Files for Share Sale on LSE’s New Private Market
stories.summary: Autonomous driving software company Wayve Technologies Ltd. has filed to sell shares on the London Stock Exchange’s new Private Securities Market, the first major company to test the novel system.

stories.summary: With the US warning it could ship its energy elsewhere, some countries in Europe are urging the bloc to revisit the rules.

stories.headline: US Dollar Climbs Ahead of Warsh; Anthropic Restrictions Lifted | Bloomberg Brief 7/1/2026
stories.summary: The US dollar strengthens as traders await Fed Chair Warsh's comments in his first public appearance alongside other central bank leaders in Sintra, Portugal. Oil declines as the US says indirect talks around Iran were positive. The US lifts its foreign access restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 AI model. Collin Martin of Charles Schwab discusses the upcoming jobs report. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Kevin Warsh to Make Global Debut, US Lifts Anthropic Restrictions | The Pulse 7/1/2026
stories.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

stories.headline: Kevin Warsh to Speak at Sintra, Trump's $1.4B in Crypto Earnings | The Opening Trade 7/1/2026
stories.summary:
Today’s main event takes place in Sintra, Portugal, where the ECB hosts the final day of its annual symposium. The Fed’s new chief Kevin Warsh makes his first public appearance outside of the US alongside the ECB’s Lagarde and BOE’s Bailey. Markets are looking for any clues about the trajectory of rates.

In a moment captured by fishers off Venezuela’s Caribbean coast, two earthquakes struck seconds apart. stories.headline: Supreme Court, for now, blocks Trump from firing Fed board member Lisa Cook
